code:
gantt
  title AI Agent ERP System — 15-Month Development Plan(Retail_Inventory)
  dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD

  %% Phase 1: Infrastructure & Planning
  section Infra & CI/CD
  Infra Design & Node Setup             :a1, 2025-07-15,60d
  Observability Stack (Retail_PointOfSale) :a2, after a1, 25d
  Ingress, Storage, Message Queue Setup:a3, after a2, 25d
  CI/CD Pipelines, Monitoring Hooks    :a4, after a3, 20d

  %% Phase 2: Core Framework
  section Agent Framework & Orchestrator
  Project Context Loader (Retail_OrderManagement)          :b1, 2025-08-29,25d
  Orchestrator + Queue Layer           :b2, after b1, 30d
  Embedding + Vector DB Setup          :b3, after b2, 25d
  API Integration Layer                :b4, after b3, 25d

  %% Phase 3: Agent Development
  section PDF Parsing Agent
  OSS Parser Research + Benchmarking   :c1, 2025-08-15, 30d
  Text & Table Extraction Pipeline     :c2, after c1, 40d
  Table Structure Reconstruction       :c3, after c2, 40d
  PDF Parsing Refinement + QA          :c4, after c3, 40d

  section Diagram Parsing Agent
  VLM Research + Dataset Prep          :d1, 2025-08-15,90d
  Basic Diagram Preprocessor           :d2, after d1, 30d
  Model Fine-tuning + Integration      :d3, after d2, 45d
  Diagram → DSL Conversion Logic       :d4, after d3, 30d
  Regression Testing                   :d5, after d4, 15d

  section Compliance Agent
  Rule Format & Spec Definition        :e1, after c4, 30d
  Equation Engine + DSL Evaluator      :e2, after e1, 60d
  Multi-standard Rule Loader           :e3, after e2, 40d
  Compliance Agent QA & Test Coverage  :e4, after e3, 30d

  section Document Generation Agent
  Prompt & Template Design             :f1, 2025-09-15, 30d
  Doc Generator Implementation         :f2, after f1, 40d
  Fine-tuning / Feedback Loop          :f3, after f2, 30d

  section LLM Runtime Setup
  Select & Deploy OSS LLM (Retail_Inventory):g1, 2025-08-20, 15d
  Fine-tuning / Evaluation Loop        :g2, after g1, 30d
  Embedding Optimization + Caching     :g3, after g2, 20d

  section Email / ERP / Logging Agents
  Email Agent Dev                      :h1, 2025-09-01, 20d
  ERP Hook Agent Dev                   :h2, after h1, 20d
  Logging / Observability Agent Hooks  :h3, after h2, 15d

  %% Final Integration
  section Integration, QA, Stabilization
  Full Agent Integration               :i1, 2026-03-15, 30d
  Compliance + Diagram Edge Testing    :i2, after i1, 30d
  Stability + Perf Testing             :i3, after i2, 30d
  Buffer + Customer Adaptations        :i4, after i3, 30d
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为AI Agent ERP系统制定一个15个月的开发计划，核心是Retail_Inventory模块。整体分成四个大阶段：基础设施与CI/CD、Agent框架与编排器、各垂直Agent开发，最后是集成与稳定化。你觉得这个框架合理吗？
明白了。基础设施这块我想确认一下：Observability Stack需要特别针对Retail_PointOfSale做适配吗？还有Message Queue和Ingress这些，是不是要等Node Setup完成后再启动？
对，Observability Stack必须对接Retail_PointOfSale的埋点规范。Message Queue这些基础设施要等a1和a2都完成后才能开始，也就是Node Setup和Observability都就绪了。另外Project Context Loader要专门处理Retail_OrderManagement的数据格式，这个别漏了。
好的，我把基础设施的依赖链理清楚了：a1做60天，然后a2接25天做Retail_PointOfSale的监控栈，a3再跟25天做队列和存储，最后a4收尾CI/CD和监控钩子。框架层那边b1的Project Context Loader我标了25天，从8月29日开始，专门注明Retail_OrderManagement。
Agent开发这块我想拆细一点。PDF Parsing和Diagram Parsing可以并行启动，但Diagram Parsing的VLM Research周期很长，要90天。Compliance Agent必须等PDF Parsing的c4完成后才能开始，因为规则定义需要成熟的文本提取能力。还有Document Generation Agent，我想让它9月中旬再启动，避开前期的资源争抢。
Compliance Agent的依赖我记下了，e1接在c4后面。但有个问题：Diagram Parsing的d1和d2之间，Basic Diagram Preprocessor只有30天，但前面VLM Research要90天，这个跨度是不是太大了？还有Regression Testing放在d5只有15天，够吗？

你说得对，Regression Testing 15天确实紧张，但这个模块整体周期已经很长，d5只能做核心回归。不过Basic Diagram Preprocessor的时间我确认没问题——90天VLM Research期间我们同步做数据集准备，d2启动时数据已经ready了。另外LLM Runtime Setup里的OSS LLM选型要注明Retail_Inventory场景，Embedding Optimization后面要加Caching层。
已调整。g1明确标注了Retail_Inventory场景，g3加了Caching。最后集成阶段我按你说的拆成四段：Full Agent Integration 30天，然后Compliance和Diagram的边界测试30天，性能压测30天，最后留30天做Buffer和客户定制。整个计划从2025年7月15日到2026年6月左右，15个月整。
完美。Email Agent、ERP Hook Agent和Logging Agent这三条支线我确认一下：h1从9月1日开始20天，h2接20天，h3收尾15天，都不影响主链路。整个图结构清晰了，可以定稿。
